meta.name: C3 — Serie A 2022-23 (all 20 clubs)
meta.note: Complete. All 20 Serie A 2022-23 clubs pickable (18 built this wave — Inter and AC Milan 2022-23 already in Wave Fa/1a from UCL semi-final appearances). Napoli scudetto season under Spalletti, 90 pts, their 3rd title. Relegated: Spezia, Cremonese, Sampdoria. Post-build corrections: De Ketelaere at Milan not Cremonese; Simeone/Barak/Provedel/Ricci/Caputo all moved clubs summer 2022 — correct placements applied. Castrovilli at Fiorentina not Verona. Updated appender cleared Fiorentina (UECL) and Roma (UEL) from tier-O. O/P overlap = 0, P/P dups = 0.
